problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization may resolve How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
